fields.summary: Add support to read resource types from a config file
[Umbrella] Extend the YARN resource model for easier resource-type management and profiles

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.
status.name: Resolved

issuetype.description: A new feature of the product, which has yet to be developed.
issuetype.name: New Feature

fields.description: This ticket is to add support to allow the RM to read the resource types to be used for scheduling from a config file. I'll file follow up tickets to add similar support in the NM as well as to handle the RM-NM handshake protocol issues.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed
